name: T-2 eight ts rules: every g-ts-* rule declares the recommended: boolean field per §16 E-8
command: for i in 001 002 003 004 005 006 007 008; do f=$(grep -l "id: g-ts-$i" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/{google,typescript}/*.yaml 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -n "$f" ] && grep -q 'recommended:' "$f" || { echo missing 1>&2; exit 1; }; done && echo recommended_present 1>&2
